name: Help Menu
description: Full example: multi-page embed with dropdown category selector and Prev / Next / Close navigation buttons.
author: Akashsuu

pages.title: 📋 Help  —  General
pages.content:
**General Commands**
`{command}` — Show this help menu
`!ping` — Check bot latency
`!serverinfo` — Server information

👤 Requested by **{mention}**

pages.title: 🛡️ Help  —  Moderation
pages.content:
**Moderation Commands**
`!ban @user [reason]` — Permanently ban
`!kick @user [reason]` — Kick a member
`!mute @user [time]` — Mute a member
`!warn @user [reason]` — Issue a warning

🏠 Server: **{server}**

pages.title: ⚙️ Help  —  Utility
pages.content:
**Utility Commands**
`!serverinfo` — Detailed server stats
`!userinfo @user` — User information
`!avatar @user` — Show user avatar

📅 {date}  ·  🕐 {time}

pages.title: 🎉 Help  —  Fun
pages.content:
**Fun Commands**
`!joke` — Tell a random joke
`!8ball [question]` — Ask the magic 8-ball
`!roll [sides]` — Roll a dice

📣 Channel: **#{channel}**
